patient's ability to walk or prevent or slow further deterioration of the patient’s ability to 
walk. Gait evaluation and training which is furnished to a patient whose ability to walk 
has been impaired by a condition other than a neurological, muscular, or skeletal 
abnormality would nevertheless be covered where physical therapy is reasonable and
